## Checklist
- [ ] **Technical Integrity**: All tests pass and linting (`ruff`) is clean.
- [ ] **Environment**: Verified changes inside the Docker sandbox.
- [ ] **Assets**: Executed `./build_tailwind.sh` if CSS or templates were modified.
- [ ] **Documentation**: Updated `README.md` or other docs if necessary.
- [ ] **Traceability**: Linked relevant issues or tasks (e.g., `Closes #123`).
